items.title: Zimbabwe announce T20I squad for India series, Tsiga earns maiden call-up
items.summary: Zimbabwe have named uncapped wicketkeeper-batter Tafadzwa Tsiga in their squad for the three-match T20I series against India, while Wessly Madhevere and Newman Nyamhuri return....
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: The quirky side of World Cup 2026 – in pictures

items.title: Sammy: 'We didn't pick Lawes just out of our heart'
items.summary: West Indies' head coach said the team management had followed rigorous "processes" to fast-track the left-arm wristspinner's selection
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
